issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' with cost requirement. DSL missing DON!! cost specification (−1). The activation has a cost that must be encoded.

Condition is incomplete. Requires two conditions: (1) Leader has {GERMA 66} type, (2) this Character must be trashed (optional action). Current condition only checks board presence, not Leader type requirement or trash-as-cost mechanic.
Missing action to trash this Character. The effect requires 'You may trash this Character' as a prerequisite/cost before the play action triggers. Current DSL only has PlayFromHand.
HasCardOnBoard checks for a card named 'GERMA 66' on board, but text requires 'your Leader has the {GERMA 66} type'. Should use 'LeaderHasType' condition instead.
